courseleaf.title: Linguistics for Language Teachers, Minor
courseleaf.informationtext:
Minor

Linguistics offers two minor programs:

  • Linguistics (General) provides the student with basic knowledge of language structure and linguistic analysis.
  • Linguistics for Language Teachers especially complements the major in English with the Teaching Area of emphasis; it is also of relevance to students interested in teaching foreign languages.

Minor Faculty Advisor

Contact the advising office.
courseleaf.requirementstext:

or LIN 001Y Introduction to Linguistics

LIN 165Introduction to Applied Linguistics4
LIN 160American Voices4
or LIN 163 Language, Gender, & Society
Choose two:8
LIN/EDU 173
Language Development
LIN 180
Second Language Learning & Teaching
LIN 182
Multilingualism
Total Units24
courseleaf.quickviewtext: The Linguistics for Language Teachers minor especially complements the major in English with the teaching area of emphasis. The minor is also relevant to students interested in teaching foreign languages.
